summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Hydrated open PRs are kept open as independent review/work items except #92813, which is routed to central security handling, and #81278, whose live state was unavailable due GitHub API rate limiting.

actions.reason: Distinct open cron migration fix; merge/fix actions are blocked in plan mode and by job frontmatter.
Distinct test/QA scenario PR with no duplicate or superseding hydrated candidate.
Distinct draft provider/policy behavior PR; not closable as duplicate or low-signal from the hydrated evidence.
Distinct runtime/provider fix; no hydrated duplicate or superseding candidate.
Distinct docs PR with proof gap; low-signal closeout is disabled and no canonical duplicate was hydrated.
Distinct feature/API PR with dirty merge state and failing proof; keep open for normal review.
Maintainer-owned distinct PR with unresolved checks; not a closure candidate.
Distinct message-delivery bug fix with one failing proof lane; keep open for targeted review.
Distinct contributor PR with useful implementation and validation; no close/merge allowed by this job.
Quarantine this exact credential-privacy item; continue classifying unrelated non-security PRs.
Distinct feature completion for dynamic agent discovery; not a dedupe or closure candidate.
Distinct installer behavior fix; no hydrated duplicate or superseding PR in this shard.
Distinct useful contributor PR; check hydration gap blocks merge-style recommendations but not conservative keep classification.
Distinct test coverage PR; keep open for maintainer review.
Distinct model-usage feature PR with proof gap; low-signal closure is disabled.
Large distinct implementation PR; keep open, with merge/replacement decisions out of scope for this plan-only shard.
Distinct auth-provider/model alias fix with failing checks; not a closure candidate.
Distinct draft PR with proof gaps; keep open rather than close in this shard.
Distinct channel/session-state fix; not a duplicate in this inventory shard.
Distinct provider/TTS compatibility fix; keep open for proof/maintainer review.
Broad hardening PR needs normal maintainer judgment, but no vulnerability-specific report or duplicate closure path is established.
Maintainer patch is independent and should stay open; post-merge closeout/merge are disabled in this job.
Distinct fallback-policy PR; not safely closable or mergeable from this shard.
Focused distinct PR with unstable state/check hydration gap; keep open for normal validation.
Live state is unavailable, so classification requires a refreshed preflight artifact.

needs_human: #81278 requires refreshed live hydration because the preflight artifact has kind unknown, state unavailable, and no target_updated_at after GitHub API rate limiting.
#92813 was routed to central OpenClaw security handling because the PR concerns credential privacy for stored API keys/OAuth tokens on chmod-less volumes.
